questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the effect of the Acquisition on competition.

Describe whether the Acquisition could affect the supply of gas compression units, spare parts or aftermarket services. Are there any important products or services that INNIO and Enerflex supply where customers have few other options?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with INNIO and Enerflex.
